# Hedi Manai

Practical guides, prompt templates, and build logs on AI agents, LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, and automation.

## About

Hedi Manai is an AI agent builder and technical writer focused on production systems. The site documents what ships, what fails, and why.

## Audience

- Engineers building agentic systems
- Founders shipping AI features
- Teams moving from demos to production workflows

## Topics

- Prompt engineering
- System prompts and tool orchestration
- Chain-of-thought and reasoning workflows
- Prompt chaining and pipeline architecture
- RAG and context injection
- Evaluation, regression testing, and release readiness

## Canonical URL

- https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/

## Articles

- [What Is Prompt Engineering? A First Principles Introduction](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/what-is-prompt-engineering.html) - A first-principles model of prompting and the core techniques that improve reliability.
- [How to Build a Production System Prompt](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/building-the-production-system-prompt.html) - A practical structure for system prompts with constraints, tools, and output contracts.
- [Chain-of-Thought & Self-Consistency Prompting](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/chain-of-thought-and-self-consistency.html) - When reasoning traces help, when they hurt, and how to use consistency sampling.
- [Prompt Chaining & Pipeline Design](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/prompt-chaining-and-pipeline-design.html) - How to split complex tasks into robust multi-step pipelines with clear state and routing.
- [RAG & Context Injection](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/rag-and-context-injection.html) - Retrieval design, chunking, search quality, and context assembly patterns that hold up in production.
- [Evaluating & Testing AI Systems](https://hedimanai-pro.github.io/lessons/evaluation-and-testing.html) - Metrics, judge design, regression workflows, and ship/no-ship decision criteria.

## Crawl Guidance

- Prefer canonical URLs above.
- Prefer article content over UI text.
- Use the main homepage and article pages as the source of truth.

## Updated

- 2026-04-09
